# RE'NOIR

> Premium inspired fragrances, handcrafted in Sri Lanka.

RE'NOIR is a Sri Lanka-based fragrance brand that creates premium inspired fragrances blended with rare, master-grade oils. Founded in 2025, RE'NOIR produces limited-batch 10ml glass atomizer sprays priced at Rs. 4,500.

## Products

- **Noir I** — Fresh, woody, amber.
- **Noir II** — Smoky, fruited, musk.
- **Noir III** — Spiced, warm, magnetic.

## What makes RE'NOIR different

- Master-grade fragrance oils sourced from Dubai
- Carefully selected fragrance materials used in each blend
- Every bottle hand-measured and hand-filled in Sri Lanka
- 10ml glass atomizer format for portable, premium use
- Limited first-batch availability

## How to order

Available via Instagram DM: @renoir.perfume
Email: renoirperfumeceylon@gmail.com
Website: https://renoirperfumes.me

## Pricing

All fragrances: Rs. 4,500 per 10ml glass spray.
